ModulList.Description: 1200er Rapid Control Low Flow Hip Sampler

InstrumentMessage.ErrorMessage: 3004, Power cycling was detected.
3000, The SmartCard firmware has been successfully uploaded.
1101, Error: Vacuum (BK) time out, vacuum too high to start turbo pump.
1445, Error: Plasma gas flow rate is too low.
1210, Error: RF amp FET drain current is too high.
1220, Error: Plasma was shutoff during Analysis (Vacuum).
1141, Error: Gate valve is closed due to an error while in Analysis mode.
